policy_note: Every source file is held to 90% line coverage. Debt entries cleared 2026-05-17, then a single entry re-added 2026-05-24 post Option→Result sibling-trait migration: `markov_residual/engine.rs` dropped to 89% because the new `.ok_or_else(|| BackendFailure)` paths fire only when internal helpers (rs_decode_step_walk, recompute_kv, executor.run_*_layer) return None. Triggering those needs the mock EngineBackend infrastructure that was deliberately scoped out (the 2026-05-24 coverage clearance documented that decision); the entry exists to track the debt rather than gold-plate. If a file regresses further the gate fails; raise it back up by adding tests, not by lowering the floor.
